item.name: Jumbo Oriental Orange Basket
item.description:
Oriental oranges, while small, are far softer and sweeter than the oranges found growing in Eorzea. The difference in size with a normal oriental orange basket is indiscernible to all but the most observant.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
VIT Bonus: +4% (Max 6)
Gear Durability Bonus: +2
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
